headline: Philip Morris vs. British American Tobacco: Which Tobacco Giant Wins for Income Investors?
summary: Philip Morris International (NYSE: PM) and British American Tobacco (NYSE: BTI) both just reported full-year 2025 results, and for income investors choosing between them, the contrast is sharper than it looks. One is executing a textbook transformation into smoke-free products. The other is cheaper, yields more, and just raised its dividend meaningfully. PM’s Smoke-Free Engine ... Philip Morris vs. British American Tobacco: Which Tobacco Giant Wins for Income Investors?
